name: Playful Possum
desc: During your Main Phase: You can destroy this face-up card on the field. Your opponent must control a monster with a higher ATK than this card for you to activate and to resolve this effect. During your Standby Phase, if this card was destroyed by this effect: You can Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can destroy this face-up card on the field. Your opponent must control a monster with a higher ATK than this card for you to activate and to resolve this effect. During your Standby Phase, if this card was destroyed by this effect: You can Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can destroy this face-up card on the field. Your opponent must control a monster with a higher ATK than this card for you to activate and to resolve this effect. During your Standby Phase, if this card was destroyed by this effect: You can Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
